title: magnolia macrocarpa
intro: Magnolia macrocarpa, also known as the Bornean magnolia, is a plant species that belongs to the Magnoliaceae family, characterized by its large, showy flowers and glossy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Magnolia macrocarpa include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing digestive issues. Magnolia macrocarpa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
